text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... It's still... only twelve steps.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well... I heard when it gets dark, these stairs gain
another step...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It sounded just like magic, so I wanted to check it out. But I've been counting them for... an hour now... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... No matter how many times I count... it's
still the same number.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay... I'm gonna count them... one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This tenacity is usually to her benefit, but in this
case, it seems to only lead to her downfall.
